insight.headline: Storefront API update
insight.what_changed: The Storefront API @inContext directive now supports an optional channelId argument as of version 2026-10. This allows developers to apply a specific sales channel's context to an entire query, including channel-specific pricing and inventory. The channelId argument can be used to fetch data for a specific sales channel, such as a web or mobile channel.
insight.developer_impact: Developers using the Storefront API should update their queries to include the channelId argument when necessary. This change enables more flexibility in querying channel-specific data, but may require updates to existing code. Developers should review their API usage and update their queries to take advantage of this new feature. The GraphQL Admin API can be used to fetch the channelId for a specific sales channel.
insight.merchant_impact: Merchants may see more accurate and channel-specific data in their storefronts, depending on how developers implement this update. This change can lead to a better user experience for merchants and their customers.
insight.why_it_matters: This update provides more flexibility and accuracy in querying sales channel data, which is essential for merchants with multiple sales channels. It allows developers to build more robust and channel-specific storefronts.

also_worth_knowing.text: Updated App Store requirements: 4.1.2 Use a unique name for your app

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.2
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI now supports non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags and allows bypassing confirmation prompts during upgrade.

updates.title: Updated App Store requirements: 4.1.2 Use a unique name for your app
updates.summary: Updated App Store requirements now mandate unique app names to reduce merchant confusion.

updates.title: Storefront API `@inContext` supports `channelId`
updates.summary: Storefront API now supports channelId in the @inContext directive, allowing for sales channel context in queries.

updates.title: `productId`, `title`,`variantSku`, and `variantTitle` fields added to `ExchangeLineItem`
updates.summary: ExchangeLineItem now includes productId, title, variantSku, and variantTitle fields.

updates.title: POS UI Extensions 2026-07 adds discount allocations to bundle components
updates.summary: POS UI Extensions now include discount allocations for bundle components.
CLI version 4.5.0 introduces new store commands, including listing and creation.

updates.title: @shopify/cli-hydrogen@13.0.1
updates.summary: Hydrogen CLI now reads disabled command metadata and preserves actionable build errors during deployment.

updates.title: @shopify/create-hydrogen@5.0.38
updates.summary: Create Hydrogen now adds an explicit app alias to new projects.

updates.title: skeleton@2026.4.5
updates.summary: Hydrogen skeleton now adds an explicit app alias to new projects.

updates.title: POS Extensions now supports a background extension target
updates.summary: POS Extensions now support a background extension target for observing events and running logic.

updates.title: Identity verification for Shopify Partners starts today
updates.summary: Identity verification for Shopify Partners is now required to ensure trust and security in the ecosystem.

recap.headline: Shopify updates Hydrogen, Storefront API, and App Store requirements

themes.title: Hydrogen Updates
themes.detail: Hydrogen received several updates, including the addition of non-interactive shop and storefront creation flags, the ability to bypass confirmation prompts during upgrades, and improvements to the Hydrogen developer preview. The @shopify/cli-hydrogen package was updated to version 13.0.2, and the @shopify/create-hydrogen package was updated to version 5.0.38.

themes.title: Storefront API and App Store Changes
themes.detail: The Storefront API now supports the @inContext directive with an optional channelId argument, and the ExchangeLineItem type has been updated to include productId, title, variantSku, and variantTitle fields. Additionally, the App Store requirements have been updated to include the use of unique app names, and app pricing has been updated to allow for more plans and no-charge plan testing.

themes.title: POS and Checkout Updates
themes.detail: POS UI Extensions now support discount allocations to bundle components, and a new background extension target has been added. The Checkout UI extensions have also been updated to include new capabilities, such as storefront API caching for catalog data.

actions.text: Update Hydrogen projects to use the latest version of @shopify/cli-hydrogen
Review and update App Store listings to comply with new requirements
Test and implement new Storefront API features, such as @inContext with channelId
